Testing python chunk execution


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(reticulate)
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.python .cell-code}
testing_object = 44
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.python .cell-code}
testing_object = testing_object + 11
```
:::


In RStudio in the following chunk, click on the arrow to "run all chunks above",
then inside the chunk double-click on `testing_object` to mark it 
and hit CTRL/CMD + ENTER to see if you can directly see 55.


::: {.cell}

```{.python .cell-code}
testing_object
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
55
```


:::
:::


If this is not the case, check this [issue](https://github.com/rstudio/rstudio/issues/17196) on Mac for a workaround.
